name: sim-debug
description: Simulation debug cycle: read RTL+TB+filelist → compile → run loop → report

tasks.detail:
Before compiling, verify all input files exist:
- [ ] <ip>/rtl/<ip>.sv — DUT (written by rtl_gen)
- [ ] <ip>/tb/tb_<ip>.sv — Testbench top (written by tb_gen)
- [ ] <ip>/tb/tc_<ip>.sv — Test cases (written by tb_gen)
- [ ] <ip>/list/<ip>.f — Filelist (written by rtl_gen)
Read each file. Note: DUT module name, TB module name, clock/reset port names, any `include paths.
If any file is missing: report which file is missing and stop — do not proceed.
Gate: All 4 input files confirmed present.

tasks.content: [SIM] Compile: iverilog using filelist — 0 compile errors
tasks.detail:
Compile command:
  iverilog -g2012 -f <ip>/list/<ip>.f <ip>/tb/tb_<ip>.sv -o <ip>/sim/<ip>.out
Create <ip>/sim/ folder if it does not exist.
For each compile error:
- [ ] Undeclared signal → find driver in DUT or TB, add declaration
- [ ] Port mismatch → compare DUT port list vs TB instantiation
- [ ] Missing include → check filelist paths, add missing file to <ip>.f
- [ ] Syntax error → fix in the file where the error occurs
Re-run until 0 errors.
Gate: iverilog exits with 0 errors before simulation.

Run: vvp <ip>/sim/<ip>.out
For each [FAIL] or $error:
- [ ] Check expected vs actual value in TB
- [ ] Grep RTL (<ip>/rtl/<ip>.sv) for the signal driver
- [ ] Fix DUT bug → edit <ip>/rtl/<ip>.sv, re-compile, re-run
- [ ] Fix TB bug → edit <ip>/tb/tb_<ip>.sv or tc_<ip>.sv, re-compile, re-run
- [ ] DUT bugs that require MAS change → output [SIM ESCALATE] → mas_gen
Loop until: all test sequences pass, 0 $error, 0 $warning.

Write <ip>/sim/sim_report.txt with:
- [ ] Date and tool version
- [ ] Input files: <ip>/rtl/<ip>.sv, <ip>/tb/tb_<ip>.sv, <ip>/list/<ip>.f
- [ ] Result: PASS / FAIL
- [ ] Total errors: 0, Total warnings: 0
- [ ] Test sequence results: S1..SN — PASS/FAIL each
- [ ] Coverage summary (if available)
Gate: File written to <ip>/sim/sim_report.txt.
